dj_text: The Smiths - Heaven Knows I'm Miserable Now (Medieval Version) was the exhale. Metallica - Seek & Destroy (Medieval Version) is the space between breaths. Exist with it. 3 more tracks lined up and ready to roll.
commercial_text: Welcome to {name}, where time stands still and your bones might just crackle along with us!
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Metallica - Seek & Destroy (Medieval Version)
